title: rootless run fails if container storage is symlinked from home directory
body:
/kind bug

Using Fedora 28 Sliverblue (`28.20180830.1`), `podman-0.8.3-1.git9d09a4d.fc28.x86_64`

I was experimenting with moving my user's container storage directory out of my home directory to a location where there is more disk space.

I nuked `~/.local/share/containers` and created a directory `/srv/miabbott/local/share/containers`.  Then I symlinked `~/.local/share/containers` to the new directory

```
$ ls -la .local/share/ | grep containers
lrwxrwxrwx.  1 miabbott miabbott     37 Aug 30 15:53 containers -> /srv/miabbott/local/share/containers/

$ ls -la /srv/miabbott/local/share/containers/storage/
total 12
drwx------. 9 miabbott miabbott  134 Jul 23 14:37 .
drwxr-xr-x. 3 miabbott root       21 Aug 30 15:51 ..
drwxr-xr-x. 2 miabbott miabbott   27 Jul 23 14:37 libpod
drwx------. 2 miabbott miabbott    6 Jul 23 14:37 mounts
-rw-------. 1 miabbott miabbott   64 Aug 30 15:54 storage.lock
drwx------. 2 miabbott miabbott    6 Jul 23 14:37 tmp
drwx------. 3 miabbott miabbott   17 Aug 18 10:40 vfs
drwx------. 6 miabbott miabbott 4096 Aug 30 15:54 vfs-containers
drwx------. 5 miabbott miabbott  260 Aug 30 15:53 vfs-images
drwx------. 2 miabbott miabbott 4096 Aug 30 15:54 vfs-layers

$ ls -la ~/.local/share/containers/storage/
total 12
drwx------. 9 miabbott miabbott  134 Jul 23 14:37 .
drwxr-xr-x. 3 miabbott root       21 Aug 30 15:51 ..
drwxr-xr-x. 2 miabbott miabbott   27 Jul 23 14:37 libpod
drwx------. 2 miabbott miabbott    6 Jul 23 14:37 mounts
-rw-------. 1 miabbott miabbott   64 Aug 30 15:54 storage.lock
drwx------. 2 miabbott miabbott    6 Jul 23 14:37 tmp
drwx------. 3 miabbott miabbott   17 Aug 18 10:40 vfs
drwx------. 6 miabbott miabbott 4096 Aug 30 15:54 vfs-containers
drwx------. 5 miabbott miabbott  260 Aug 30 15:53 vfs-images
drwx------. 2 miabbott miabbott 4096 Aug 30 15:54 vfs-layers
```

I was able to list the images with `podman images`, but `podman run` returns an error:

```
$ podman images
REPOSITORY                          TAG      IMAGE ID       CREATED       SIZE
docker.io/library/busybox           latest   e1ddd7948a1c   4 weeks ago   1.38MB
docker.io/library/alpine            latest   11cd0b38bc3c   7 weeks ago   4.67MB
registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora   28       e555121ced0f   8 weeks ago   263MB

$ podman run --rm -it docker.io/alpine echo 'hello'
container create failed: /var/home/miabbott/.local/share/containers/storage/vfs/dir/8f553411b3fd32d7b216abc65e58297152647bc11f70fe4709a833d73f7488ab is not an absolute path or is a symlink
: internal libpod error
```

I saw symlinks discussed in #1073, but it looks like the fix only addresses a symlinked home dir, not the actual container storage.

Perhaps this is a bad idea to try, so let me know if I'm on a bad path.

comments.body:
that is a common issue with runc that doesn't like symlinks in the rootfs, we already had that issue if the symlink is the home directory (as on Silverblue) but we didn't take into account a so deep symlink in the rootfs, thanks @miabbott to have found it :-)

I've opened a PR to resolve the rootfs at mount time: https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1390
That PR works for me!  Thanks @giuseppe
